mapper.select: select l.like_id, l.checkin_id, l.user_id, l.create_time, u.nickname, u.avatar from travel_checkin_like l left join travel_user u on l.user_id = u.user_id where l.checkin_id = #{checkinId} and l.user_id = #{userId}

select l.like_id, l.checkin_id, l.user_id, l.create_time, u.nickname, u.avatar from travel_checkin_like l left join travel_user u on l.user_id = u.user_id where l.checkin_id = #{checkinId} order by l.create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into travel_checkin_like (checkin_id, user_id, create_time) values (#{checkinId}, #{userId}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from travel_checkin_like where checkin_id = #{checkinId} and user_id = #{userId}
